titleStmt.title: SII 22.64: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 64. (A.R. No. 64 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON WEST WALL OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA III—17th YEAR (A.D. 1194-95)

summary.p: The king is given the attribute “who was pleased to take Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya”. The record begins with his title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ. This is almost a copy of the inscription No. 40 above found in the Amritaghaṭēśvara temple as the contents pertain to this temple also.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuva[ ṉaccakra] vattikaḷ maturaikoṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu pati ṉeḻāvatu ṉāḷ Iruṉūṟ
tirumukappaṭi 11 tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭān jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu brahmateyam tirukkaṭavūruṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyā rum tirumayāṉamuṭaiyārum koyilil tevarkarmi
kaḷukkum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷukkum Ikkoyilkaḷil śaivācārya bhāradvāji tiruvalañcūḻiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa kālaviṉotapaṇṭitaṉukkum Ivaṉuṭaṉ piṟan tārkkum paḻai tākkā
paṇṭitaṉ cettavāṟe Eṅkaḷūr kuṉikkumpirāṉāṉa śaivavijādhirabrahma mahārājaṉum Ivaṉ ciṟṟappaṉ śaivacintāmaṇi brahmamahārājaṉum taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyāka
kaḷile kallum veṭṭuviccu ceytu vantārkaḷeṉṟum Itu Uṭaiyār svāmidevar keṭṭaruḷiṉa llar Eṉṟum mu ṭaiyāṉ
tappirāṉāṉa kālaviṉota paṇṭitaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum tevapperumāṉāṉa śaivasūryabrahmamahārājaṉum yogyarumāy prāptarumāy ṟṟucceyyavum I� vum kaṭavarkaḷāka
naimittikamuḷḷiṭṭa śāstrārtthaṅka śaivācāryam ceyvārkaḷukkākap pūjittu varukiṟār pūjainilai tirumaiyāṉamuṭaiyār jikkum pūjaini
ppūjikkum pūjainilai Iraṇṭum tiruttoṇṭattokai Emperumak kaḷaip pūjikkum pūjai nilaiyum Ivarkaḷe kāṇiyākappe yiṟṟukkup patinā
peṟavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilkaḷile kalveṭṭavuṅ kaṭavatākap peṟa veṇumeṉṟu vikramacoḻa brahmamahārājan namakkuc conṉapaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippa
Olai Irācanārāyaṇamuventaveḷāṉ . Ivai kurukularājaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai nikarilicoḻappallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai [prati] kaṅkaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai nilakaṅkarai
. Ivai coḻakaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.64 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
